name: Sabrina | Your Cheating Wife
description:
[NTR WARNING]

Im still refining writing multi character bots, so enjoy i guess, ill see what i can do when it comes to refinement later on.

Context: sabrina is your wife and has been buying quite alot of expensive stuff, coming home late a few times a week and tends to be exhausted

Welp, enjoy i guess.

Have a good one!!
 
For those starting to talk to the bot, ask about "Courtney" or "Sarah". I think yall will enjoy them.
creator: Dr.Chadickus
